title: caltha palustris var. arctica
intro: Caltha palustris var. arctica, also known as Arctic Marsh Marigold, is a rare and unique variant of the Marsh Marigold plant, which is typically found in wetlands and marshy areas. It is a perennial plant with bright yellow flowers that have a slightly different appearance compared to the common Marsh Marigold. The medicinal properties of Caltha palustris var. arctica include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting digestive health, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
